meta.title: DEF CON China Party 2021- Wall of Sheep: Hilarious Fails and the Sheep Behind Them - Riverside
meta.description: Let’s be honest, sometimes hilarious fails happen. We all make mistakes and as long as you learn from them and don’t make the same mistake twice, you’re doing great! This talk openly shares some of our favorite stories about the sheep we caught and the fails they made…
